full_text:
Jin Xuan (Yuanji) 金旋 (元機)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Xuan (金旋), styledYuanji (元機), was born in Jingzhao. Governed Wuling. Defeated and killed by the forces of Liu Bei. Jin Xuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Biao, and the Shu Kingdom. Jin Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
